T

TextArea - Class in microui.component
A multi-line text editing component with support for selection, scrolling, copy/paste, undo/redo, and keyboard navigation.
TextArea() - Constructor for class microui.component.TextArea
Constructs a TextArea with default size and position.
TextArea(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.TextArea
Constructs a TextArea with specified position and dimensions.
TextEditorModel - Class in microui.core
A comprehensive text editor model that manages multi-line text editing operations, cursor positioning, and text selection.
TextEditorModel() - Constructor for class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Constructs a TextEditorModel with empty text content.
TextEditorModel.Direction - Enum Class in microui.core
Provides constants for cursor direction
TextField - Class in microui.component
A single-line text input field with support for text editing, selection, copy/paste, undo/redo, validation, and password masking.
TextField() - Constructor for class microui.component.TextField
Constructs a TextField with default maximum size, centered on the screen.
TextField(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.TextField
Constructs a TextField with specified position and dimensions.
TextTooltipContent - Class in microui.feedback
Tooltip content implementation that displays text with customizable styling.
TextTooltipContent(String) - Constructor for class microui.feedback.TextTooltipContent
Constructs a TextTooltipContent with the specified text.
TextView - Class in microui.component
A component for displaying text with automatic resizing, alignment, and clipping options.
TextView() - Constructor for class microui.component.TextView
Constructs a TextView with empty text, centered on the screen.
TextView(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.TextView
Constructs a TextView with specified position and dimensions but no initial text.
TextView(String) - Constructor for class microui.component.TextView
Constructs a TextView with specified text, centered on the screen.
TextView(String, float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.TextView
Constructs a TextView with specified text, position, and dimensions.
ThemeBlack - Class in microui.core.style.theme
Dark theme implementation with black/dark gray color scheme and gradient effects.
ThemeBlack() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeBlack
 
ThemeGlass - Class in microui.core.style.theme
Glass/transparent theme implementation with subtle animations and translucent effects.
ThemeGlass() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
 
ThemeGray - Class in microui.core.style.theme
Gray theme implementation with a monochromatic color scheme.
ThemeGray() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGray
 
ThemeManager - Class in microui.core.style.theme
Manager for handling theme selection and retrieval in the MicroUI framework.
ThemeManager() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeManager
 
ThemeWhite - Class in microui.core.style.theme
Light theme implementation with a white/gray color scheme and gradient effects.
ThemeWhite() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.theme.ThemeWhite
 
Timer - Class in microui.util
Timer utility for tracking progress between two endpoints over time.
Timer() - Constructor for class microui.util.Timer
Constructs a Timer with default settings.
TINY - Enum constant in enum class microui.constants.AutoResizeMode
Smallest text size - minimal text for maximum content.
toggle() - Method in class microui.component.CheckBox
Toggles the checked state of the checkbox.
toggle() - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Toggles the checked state of the checkbox.
Tooltip - Class in microui.feedback
Tooltip manager that displays contextual information when users hover over components.
Tooltip(Component) - Constructor for class microui.feedback.Tooltip
Constructs a Tooltip associated with the specified component.
TooltipContent - Class in microui.feedback
Abstract base class for tooltip content implementations.
TooltipContent() - Constructor for class microui.feedback.TooltipContent
Constructs a TooltipContent with default settings.
TooltipManager - Class in microui.service
Manages tooltip display in the application.
toString() - Method in record class microui.core.base.Container.Entry
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class microui.util.SpatialState
Returns a string representation of this record class.
TRANSPARENT - Static variable in class microui.core.style.Color
Fully transparent color
TRIGGER - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator.ReactionMode
Animation direction only changes when current animation completes.
